title: Beyond Labeled Datasets: Advancing TTS with Direct Preference Optimization on Unlabeled Speech Dataset
relevance_note: Applies Direct Preference Optimization to TTS training on unlabeled speech datasets; advances TTS training (no abstract available, scored on title).
venue_detail: ICNLSP-2025: 8th International Conference on Natural Language and Speech Processing (Odense, Denmark, Aug 2025)
